The '''A-Z-Z-3 Light Freighter''' was a popular [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] transport in use during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
24 meters in length and armed with two turreted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], the A-Z-Z-3 could carry eight passengers and 60 tons of cargo. Like most [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] designs, the A-Z-Z-3 included several backup systems including a backup shield generator.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The only known specifications for the A-Z-Z-3 are for the ''[[Black Obsession]]'', which is identified as "modified."

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Infiltration (adventure)|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}
